data.title: Rai Way Publishes 2025 Annual Report and Governance Documentation Ahead of 2026 Meeting
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Rai Way S.p.A. ( (IT:RWAY) ).

Rai Way has made available to the public its 2025 Annual Financial Report, including draft separate financial statements, the management report with sustainability reporting, and related certifications, alongside the reports of the independent auditors and the Board of Statutory Auditors. The company has also published its 2025 corporate governance and ownership report and its remuneration policy and compensation report, providing investors and stakeholders with updated transparency on financial performance, governance practices and executive pay ahead of the 2026 ordinary shareholders’ meeting.

These disclosures, accessible at the company’s registered office, on its website and via the 1Info storage mechanism, reinforce Rai Way’s compliance with Italian and EU regulatory requirements and support informed decision-making by shareholders. By consolidating financial, sustainability, governance and remuneration information in advance of the assembly, Rai Way underlines its commitment to corporate transparency and aligns its reporting with evolving norms for listed infrastructure and media transmission operators.

The most recent analyst rating on (IT:RWAY) stock is a Buy with a EUR6.50 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Rai Way S.p.A. stock, see the IT:RWAY Stock Forecast page.

More about Rai Way S.p.A.

Rai Way S.p.A. is an integrated digital infrastructure operator and service provider focused on media content distribution in Italy. The company operates RAI’s radio and television transmission and broadcasting networks and runs more than 2,300 telecommunications sites, a microwave network, satellite systems, a proprietary CDN, extensive optical fiber, distributed data centers and three control centers nationwide.

Average Trading Volume: 333,664

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: €1.62B

data.title: Origen Resources Adds Critical Minerals Expert to Board Amid Brazilian REE Push
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Origen Resources ( (TSE:ORGN) ).

Origen Resources has appointed geoscientist António Silva to its board of directors, adding deep technical expertise in critical raw materials, including rare earths, lithium and gold, as well as ceramics-related minerals. Silva’s academic background in Portugal and Brazil and his established network in Brazil have already supported Origen’s acquisition of a rare earth elements portfolio in that country, strengthening its strategic positioning in the South American critical minerals space.

The appointment follows the resignation of director Thomas Hawkins, whom the company thanked for his years of service. By aligning its board composition with its focus on the Brazilian rare earth acquisition and its lithium and gold-silver projects in Argentina and Canada, Origen is signaling a stronger operational emphasis on critical minerals and precious metals, with potential implications for exploration strategy and regional growth opportunities.

The most recent analyst rating on (TSE:ORGN) stock is a Hold with a C$0.08 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Origen Resources stock, see the TSE:ORGN Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on ORGN Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, ORGN is a Neutral.

The score is held back primarily by weak financial performance—no revenue, continued losses, and persistent cash burn—despite a debt-free balance sheet. Technicals are supportive with price above major moving averages, but extremely overbought momentum signals increase near-term risk. Valuation appears low on P/E, though its signal is limited given the current pre-revenue fundamentals.

To see Spark’s full report on ORGN stock, click here.

More about Origen Resources

Origen Resources Inc. is a mineral exploration company focused on critical and precious metals, with key assets including a newly acquired rare earth elements portfolio in Brazil, the 100%-owned Los Sapitos lithium project in Argentina, and the 100%-owned Wishbone gold-silver project in British Columbia, alongside three additional precious and base metal projects in southern British Columbia.

Average Trading Volume: 60,136

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$4.63M

data.title: Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds Confirms SEBI Demat Compliance for March Quarter
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds Ltd. ( (IN:BSHSL) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds Limited has informed the stock exchange that its registrar and share transfer agent, Skyline Financial Services, has issued a compliance certificate under Regulation 74(5) of the SEBI (Depositories and Participants) Regulations, 2018 for the quarter ended March 31, 2026. The certificate confirms that no physical share certificates were received for dematerialisation of equity shares during the quarter, indicating continued adherence to demat norms and supporting transparent shareholding records for investors and regulators.

This disclosure underscores the company’s ongoing regulatory compliance in handling its equity securities through depositories rather than physical certificates. By maintaining a fully dematerialised regime for share transfers, Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds reinforces governance standards and operational efficiency in its capital market dealings, which is relevant for shareholders monitoring settlement practices and corporate compliance.

More about Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds Ltd.

Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds Limited is an Indian agribusiness company based in Rajkot, Gujarat, operating in the seeds industry. It focuses on hybrid seeds and related agricultural inputs, serving farmers and agricultural markets with improved seed varieties tailored to enhance crop productivity.

Average Trading Volume: 85,393

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: 10.53B INR

data.title: Titan posts strong Q4 as jewellery and global expansion power 46% consumer business growth
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Titan Company Limited ( (IN:TITAN) ) is now available.

Titan Company reported robust growth in its consumer businesses for the fourth quarter of FY 2025-26, with overall consumer revenues rising about 46% year-on-year and its domestic network expanding to 3,603 stores after a net addition of 47 outlets. International operations, bolstered by the addition of 127 Damas Jewellery stores, grew 156% year-on-year, taking Titan’s global store count in this segment to 162 and underscoring an aggressive push beyond the Indian market.

Jewellery remained the key growth driver, posting around 46% year-on-year revenue growth and about 52% growth in consumer sales, supported by higher ticket sizes and strong performances from Tanishq and Mia despite sharp increases in gold prices. The watches division saw modest 7% growth, with solid demand for analog watches offsetting a steep decline in smartwatches, while Emerging Businesses and EyeCare also delivered double-digit growth, indicating continued diversification of Titan’s consumer portfolio.

More about Titan Company Limited

Titan Company Limited is an Indian consumer lifestyle company best known for its jewellery, watches, and eyewear businesses, with brands such as Tanishq, Mia, Zoya, CaratLane, Titan, Sonata and Fastrack. The company operates an extensive omni-channel retail network across India and is expanding internationally, including through the integration of Damas Jewellery stores into its network.

Average Trading Volume: 34,440

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: 3768.1B INR

See more data about TITAN stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Apex Critical Metals Extends Rift Rare Earth Zone and Uncovers High-Value NdPr Enrichment
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest update is out from Eagle Bay Resources Corp. ( (TSE:APXC) ).

Apex Critical Metals reported initial 2026 drill results from its Rift Rare Earth Project in Nebraska, highlighted by 81.6 metres grading 2.02% total rare earth oxides, including 50.9 metres at 2.40% REO, in step-out hole RIFT26-002. The hole extends confirmed mineralized carbonatite roughly 100 metres south of historical drilling and, together with prior holes, indicates a mineralized zone exceeding 700 metres in strike that remains open in all directions.

The company also announced the discovery of a highly enriched neodymium-praseodymium zone averaging a 49% NdPr distribution over 10 metres at 0.75% REO, far above typical carbonatite ranges of 14–20%. This concentration of higher-value rare earths, if confirmed by follow-up drilling and shown to be continuous, could significantly enhance Rift’s economic potential and strengthen Apex’s positioning within the U.S. rare earth supply chain as assay results from seven additional holes are awaited.

More about Eagle Bay Resources Corp.

Apex Critical Metals Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration company focused on identifying and developing critical and strategic metals, with a key emphasis on rare earth elements. Its primary asset is the 100%-owned Rift Rare Earth Project in the Elk Creek Carbonatite Complex in southeastern Nebraska, targeting materials vital to the U.S. domestic rare earth supply chain and electrification technologies.

Average Trading Volume: 73,597

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: C$171.2M

For a thorough assessment of APXC stock, go to TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Pulsar Group Discloses Kestrel-Linked Share Transfers, Confirms 28.55% Voting Block
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Access Intelligence ( (GB:PULS) ) has issued an update.

Pulsar Group plc has disclosed changes in the shareholdings connected to non-executive director Max Royde, following the transfer of 106,500 ordinary shares out of Kestrel Partners LLP’s discretionary management due to a reorganisation of two client portfolios. The shares remain with the same beneficial owners, meaning there is no change in ultimate economic exposure for those investors.

Royde, a partner in Kestrel and investor in the Kestrel Opportunities Fund, is deemed to have a beneficial interest in Kestrel Opportunities’ entire holding of Pulsar shares, which totals 20,227,082 ordinary shares. In aggregate, Kestrel’s various clients now control voting rights over 38,708,742 Pulsar shares, representing about 28.55% of the company’s total voting rights, underscoring Kestrel’s continuing position as a significant shareholder and influential voting bloc in the company.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:PULS) stock is a Hold with a £35.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Access Intelligence stock, see the GB:PULS Stock Forecast page.

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, PULS is a Neutral.

Access Intelligence faces significant challenges with profitability and cash flow, as reflected in its financial performance score. Technical analysis indicates bearish momentum, with the stock trading below key moving averages. The valuation is unattractive due to a negative P/E ratio and no dividend yield. These factors collectively contribute to a low overall stock score.

To see Spark’s full report on PULS stock, click here.

More about Access Intelligence

Pulsar Group plc, listed on AIM under ticker PULS, operates in the media and communications technology space, providing data-driven audience intelligence and analytics solutions. The company focuses on serving marketers, media owners, and communications professionals seeking insights into online behaviour, social media trends, and digital engagement across global markets.

data.title: Northwest Biotherapeutics Completes Advent BioServices Acquisition Deal
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Northwest Biotherapeutics ( (NWBO) ) has shared an update.

On October 24, 2025, Northwest Biotherapeutics, Inc. completed the acquisition of Advent BioServices Ltd., a U.K.-based CDMO that had been providing product development, manufacturing, cryostorage, and distribution services for the company’s DCVax immunotherapy platform. Advent became a wholly owned subsidiary, with consideration structured as approximately $1.9 million in purchase price plus about $8.3 million in settlement of pre-existing payables, payable in installments over two years with interest accruing at 7.5% on unpaid balances.

At closing, Northwest Biotherapeutics also recovered 12 million shares of its common stock and 5.5 million stock options previously issued to Advent as service compensation, retiring the shares to treasury and canceling the options, which reduces potential dilution for existing shareholders. The deal, a related-party transaction due to CEO Linda Powers’ control of the seller, was approved under the company’s related-party policies, and the company obtained a regulatory waiver allowing it not to provide certain historical and pro forma financial statements related to the acquisition.

More about Northwest Biotherapeutics

Northwest Biotherapeutics, Inc. is a biotechnology company focused on developing immunotherapy products, including its DCVax product platform, for the treatment of cancer. The company utilizes contract development and manufacturing services to support product development, manufacturing, cryostorage, and distribution of its DCVax portfolio, particularly its DCVax-L product candidate.

Average Trading Volume: 2,423,789

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: $313.2M

data.title: Shell Continues Capital Return Drive With Fresh Share Buy-Back Tranche
data.description:
Easter Sale - 70% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

An update from Shell (UK) ( (GB:SHEL) ) is now available.

Shell plc has repurchased and cancelled just over 1.28 million shares across multiple venues in London and continental Europe as part of its ongoing share buy-back programme. The purchases, executed in sterling and euros at volume-weighted average prices in the mid-30s in local currency terms, are aimed at reducing the company’s share count and returning excess capital to investors.

The transactions were carried out by Morgan Stanley & Co. International, which is operating the programme independently within pre-set parameters until early May 2026. The buy-back activity is being conducted under Shell’s existing shareholder authorities and in full compliance with UK and EU market abuse and listing rules, underscoring the company’s continued emphasis on regulated capital management initiatives.

The most recent analyst rating on (GB:SHEL) stock is a Buy with a £4004.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Shell (UK) stock, see the GB:SHEL Stock Forecast page.

Spark’s Take on SHEL Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, SHEL is a Outperform.

The score is driven primarily by solid underlying financial performance and supportive earnings-call guidance on cost reduction, capital discipline, and shareholder returns. Technicals are strong but look overheated, and while valuation is reasonable with a ~3% yield, weaker recent free-cash-flow momentum and operational risks (Chemicals, safety, and reserve-life decline) cap the upside.

To see Spark’s full report on SHEL stock, click here.

More about Shell (UK)

Shell plc is a global energy company active across the oil, gas and power value chain, including exploration, production, refining, chemicals and integrated energy solutions. Listed in London and Amsterdam, the group focuses on supplying fuels, lubricants and low‑carbon energy to industrial, commercial and retail customers worldwide.
